"'''ISB Intercepts'''" was a question-and-answer column presented in the ''[[Star Wars Adventure Journal]]'' regarding ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.

It followed the concept that it was an [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|Imperial Security Bureau]] report on intercepted [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] communications encoded as questions and answers regarding such a game.

==[[Star Wars Adventure Journal 9|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 9]]==
